title: Italian Brainrot
description: 🧠 The ultimate brain rot experience.  Over 30 brain rots with unique behavior, animations and sounds with vanilla art style. From the TikTok/Instagram memes! Fun!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/900011beaa5a6ef76dc9b9ce512b75d2834cb544.webp) **
The Ultimate Minecraft Brainrot Experience
** # ### 🌍 About **Italian Brainrot** is fun modpack about the Ai Genereted Italian brainrot creatures from Instagram/TikTok. Currently there are 32 of them. Every creature has it's own sounds, animations and behavior. There are of course Shaders that are compatible with distant horizons. Fight them, some of them are agressive. Build zoos, aqauriums or other builds with them. Can you craft all of them? # ### 📦 Content - 32 Italian brainrots - Overhauled world generation. - 100+ New animals. - Distant horizons - Massive render distance without lag. - Built-in world sharing. - Quality of life mods. # ### 🧠 Brainrot Features - 🎬 Unique behavior - Some Attack, Others are friendly. - 🌼 Vanilla art style. - 🔊 Every brainrot has it's own unique sound. - 💫 Fully animated #

🧠brainrots

Tung Tung Tung Sahur, Bombardiro Crocodilo, Tralalelo Tralala, Balerina Cappucina, Brr Brr patapim, Cappucino Assassino, La Vaca Saturno Saturnita and much more...

# ### ❓ How To Start? 1. Execute command /start, merchant with brainrots will appear. 2. Gather resource to buy them. 3. Enjoy brainrots. # # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server?
